creator.name: Creator
creator.description: Builders, makers, inventors—those who shape things that last.
creator.mechanicalEffects: Choose one Calling; pre-Visitation Scions should pick a Calling that matches a Favored Calling of the eventual divine parent (Appendix 2, Origin p. 170 intro). Knack lists expand by tier in Pandora’s Box / later books.
creator.source: Scion_Origin_(Revised_Download).pdf, Callings pp. 98–99; SCION_Pandoras_Box_(Revised_Download).pdf (Knacks by Calling)

guardian.name: Guardian
guardian.description: Protectors who stand between harm and what they value.
guardian.mechanicalEffects: See creator entry for Calling match guidance at Origin tier.

healer.name: Healer
healer.description: Those who mend bodies, minds, and communities.
healer.mechanicalEffects: See creator entry for Calling match guidance at Origin tier.

hunter.mechanicalEffects: See creator entry for Calling match guidance at Origin tier.

judge.description: Arbiters who weigh truth, debt, and consequence.

leader.description: Those who organize, inspire, and bear responsibility for others.
